printed.name: Monkey
printed.setup: Lying supine, arms straight and shoulder width apart, hands holding PTBar, legs bent, toes placed on PTBar, feet hip width apart and plantarflexed

movement.exhale: Roll up, simultaneously straighten legs / Roll down, simultaneously bend legs, return to start position

objectives: Hip extensor and ankle-foot plantarflexor stretch
cues: Maintain plantarflexion while rolling up and down
Engage back extensors in pike position
